product_overview: A public-facing immersive storytelling site that publishes portrait-oriented folk narratives with a cinematic reader, a browsable story catalogue, an animated landing experience, and an integrated AI chat assistant for discovery and exploration.
core_goals: Discover and browse published stories and archives in a visually rich catalogue
Open and read stories in an immersive, chapter-by-chapter cinematic reader with narration and illustrations
Quickly find and surface published story titles and platform context from the landing experience
Interact with an on-site AI assistant to ask questions, get recommendations, or explore content
Navigate site-level content (protocol, data terms, archive, system status) and authenticate if desired

features.name: Landing Page Hero
features.description: A full-viewport cinematic hero that welcomes visitors with animated typography, ambient particle effects, and CTAs that drive discovery into the story catalogue.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe animated hero headline with matrix rain effect -> Observe pulsing ember status badge -> Scroll down -> Observe scroll progress bar updating
Navigate to / -> Activate primary hero CTA to navigate to /stories -> Land on the Story Catalogue

features.name: Story Ticker / Marquee
features.description: An animated typographic marquee that continuously displays recently published story titles to surface new and notable content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe marquee rows scrolling with published story titles
Navigate to / -> Hover over a title in the marquee -> See the title highlight to confirm focus

features.name: Manifesto Section
features.description: A CMS-driven mission statement area that renders rich TipTap content from the global content store, with loading fallbacks.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the manifesto section -> See skeleton loading state while content is fetched -> See rendered manifesto content or a fallback quote

features.name: Feature Bento Grid
features.description: An animated bento-style card grid that highlights core platform capabilities and invites exploration through motion and hover affordances.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to reveal the bento grid -> Observe GSAP-driven reveal animations of cards
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the bento grid -> Hover over a card -> See border hover and subtle interaction feedback

features.name: Capabilities Section
features.description: A four-column capability overview with scroll-triggered icon and line animations that explains platform building blocks.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to capabilities section -> Observe icon reveal and line expansion animations as the section enters view
Navigate to / -> Scroll to capabilities section -> Hover a capability cell -> See icon scale and color transition

features.name: Full-bleed CTA Section
features.description: A cinematic, full-bleed call-to-action area that reinforces exploration with ambient illustration and a prominent action into the story catalogue.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to CTA section -> Observe animated CTA headline and ember overlay
Navigate to / -> Scroll to CTA section -> Activate primary CTA to navigate to /stories

features.name: Navbar & Global Navigation
features.description: Site navigation that exposes core pages, theme controls, and sign-in/out affordances so visitors can move between discovery, archive, and protocol pages.
user_flows: On any page -> Use the brand link to navigate to / -> Use the Stories nav link to navigate to /stories -> Use the Archive nav link to navigate to /archive -> Use the Protocol nav link to navigate to /protocol
On any page -> Toggle dark/light theme -> Observe theme update across the site
On any page -> Use Sign In to navigate to /login

features.name: WiseEpu AI Chatbot
features.description: A floating AI assistant available across the public site that accepts natural-language queries, streams responses, and helps visitors discover content or ask questions about the platform.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the WiseEpu chat panel -> Type a message into the chat input -> Submit the message -> See the AI stream a response in the chat panel -> Close the chat panel

features.name: Story Catalogue (Public Listing)
features.description: A public, browsable catalogue of published stories showing portrait covers, titles, tags and brief metadata to help visitors discover reading material.
user_flows: Navigate to /stories -> View story cards in a grid layout with cover images, titles, and tags -> Filter or browse story listings -> Select a story card to open its immersive reader

features.name: Cinematic Story Reader (Immersive Reader)
features.description: A full-screen, chapter-by-chapter immersive reader that presents story content with cinematic layout, optional TTS narration, and chapter illustrations for a focused reading experience.
user_flows: From a story card, open the immersive reader -> Use the sidebar or chapter list to navigate between chapters -> Scroll through chapter content to read the text
From a story card, open the immersive reader -> Play TTS narration audio -> Pause TTS narration audio -> View chapter illustrations alongside the text

features.name: Manifest Archive / Footer
features.description: Archive access and footer content that provide historical story collections, data terms, and site credits for visitors seeking older material or legal information.
user_flows: Use site navigation to go to /archive -> Browse archived story listings and older or completed stories
On any page -> Navigate to /data-terms to read privacy and data policies -> Navigate to /sys-status to view the system status dashboard

routes.description: Landing page with hero, story ticker, bento grid, capabilities section, CTA, and WiseEpu AI chatbot
Story catalogue / public archive listing page
Individual story immersive reader with cinematic layout, chapter navigation, TTS narration
Archive listing page for older or completed stories

features.name: Landing Page Hero
features.description: Full-viewport hero section with animated headline, ember particles, Loktak Lake video, CTA buttons and scroll progress indicator
user_interactions: View animated hero headline with matrix rain effect
See pulsing ember status badge
Click "Browse Stories & Archives" CTA button to navigate to /stories
Click "Explore the Platform" outline button
Observe scroll progress bar updating on scroll

features.name: Story Ticker / Marquee
features.description: Animated typographic wall displaying published story titles as scrolling marquee rows fetched from Supabase
user_interactions: Observe marquee rows scrolling with published story titles
Hover over titles to trigger color highlight effect

features.name: Manifesto Section
features.description: CMS-driven mission statement block that renders TipTap rich text content fetched from Supabase global_content table
user_interactions: View rendered manifesto content or fallback quote
See skeleton loading state while fetching

features.name: Feature Bento Grid
features.description: GSAP-animated bento card grid showcasing platform capabilities (Folklore Repository, Polyvocal Streams, The Hearth CMS, Neo-Archival Protocol)
user_interactions: Scroll to reveal animated bento cards
Hover over cards to see border hover effects

features.name: Capabilities Section
features.description: Four-column grid of platform capability cells with GSAP scroll-triggered line and icon animations
user_interactions: Scroll to trigger icon reveal and line expansion animations
Hover cells to see icon scale and color transition

features.name: CTA Section
features.description: Full-bleed cinematic call-to-action section with background illustration, ember overlay, and action buttons
user_interactions: View animated CTA headline
Click primary CTA button to navigate to /stories

features.name: Navbar
features.description: Site navigation with brand logo, nav links, theme toggle, and auth-aware sign-in/out buttons via Clerk
user_interactions: Click brand logo to navigate to home
Click nav links (Stories, Archive, Protocol)
Click Sign In button to navigate to /login
Toggle dark/light theme

features.name: WiseEpu AI Chatbot
features.description: Floating AI chatbot powered by Google Gemma via OpenRouter, streams responses using Vercel AI SDK
user_interactions: Click floating chat trigger button to open chat panel
Type message in chat input
Submit message and see streaming AI response
Close chat panel

features.name: Story Catalogue
features.description: Public listing of all published stories with cover images, titles, tags and links to individual story readers
user_interactions: View story cards in a grid layout
Click a story card to navigate to /stories/[slug]
Filter or browse story listings

features.name: Cinematic Story Reader
features.description: Immersive full-screen chapter-by-chapter reader with sidebar navigation, TTS narration, and AI illustration system
user_interactions: Navigate between chapters using sidebar or chapter list
Play/pause TTS narration audio
Scroll through chapter content
View chapter illustrations

known_limitations.issue: Running in dev mode — tests capped at 15 high-priority cases
known_limitations.impact: Concurrent test load may cause dev server slowness

known_limitations.issue: Clerk auth redirects require test account credentials
known_limitations.impact: Auth-gated routes need valid test user to access

known_limitations.issue: Manifesto content depends on Supabase global_content seed data
known_limitations.impact: Fallback quote shown if no seed data present
